properties.ExtractProcessedIds: SELECT Id AS id FROM FLOWFILE

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT Id, ImageStudyUID, ImageSeriesUID, ImageSeriesNumber, Description, Manufacturer
FROM eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imageseries WHERE processed = FALSE;

properties.Replacement Value: UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imageseries SET processed = TRUE WHERE id IN ( ${'$1':replaceAll('"', "'")} )
UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagestudy SET processed = TRUE WHERE id IN ( ${'$1':replaceAll('"', "'")} )

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT Id, ImageStudyUID, ImageSeriesUID, SliceThickness, PixelRowSpacing, PixelColSpacing, ImageRows, ImageColumns, KVP, XRayTubeCurrent, Exposure, ExposureTime, SpiralPitchFactor, FilterType, ConvolutionKernel 
FROM eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagetags WHERE processed = FALSE;

properties.Replacement Value: UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagetags SET processed = TRUE WHERE id IN ( ${'$1':replaceAll('"', "'")} )

properties.ExtractProcessedIds: SELECT Id AS id FROM FLOWFILE

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT Id, ImageStudyUID, ImagingProcedureIdentifier, ImageStudyCategoryCode
FROM eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagestudy WHERE processed = FALSE;

properties.ExtractProcessedIds: SELECT Id AS id FROM FLOWFILE
